subcodes.first_line: O Pen! Make mention of him who hath been named Mahdi, that he may rejoice and be of them that render thanks. O Mahdi! Hearken unto the Call that hath been raised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا قلم اذکر من سمی بمهدی لیفرح و یکون من الشاکرین یا مهدی اسمع الندآء الذی ارتفع
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
